scripts.build: pnpm run build --filter @datarizen/contracts --filter @datarizen/design && pnpm run build --filter builder --filter dashboard --filter runtime
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n builder,dashboard,runtime -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client/apps/builder" "npm run dev --prefix client/apps/dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix client/apps/runtime"
